jobs.name: polymarket-scan-leaderboard
jobs.prompt: Run the leaderboard scanner to fetch top 500 wallets from Polymarket

jobs.name: polymarket-scan-wallets
jobs.prompt: Scan wallet profiles - fetch 30-day trade history and score all tracked wallets

jobs.name: polymarket-monitor-trades
jobs.prompt: Monitor tracked wallets for new trades and score them

jobs.name: polymarket-score-trades
jobs.prompt: Score pending trades and make copy/watch/skip decisions

jobs.name: polymarket-update-paper-pnl
jobs.prompt: Update paper trade PnL with current market prices

jobs.name: polymarket-review-outcomes
jobs.prompt: Review resolved paper trades and evaluate decision quality

jobs.name: polymarket-update-rules
jobs.prompt: Weekly rule adaptation based on paper trading performance

jobs.name: polymarket-daily-report
jobs.prompt: Generate and send end-of-day report via Telegram
